name: Booking.com
business_model: OTA marketplace connecting travelers with accommodation providers. Commission-based revenue on bookings.
ai_strategy: AI-powered personalized search ranking, smart pricing suggestions, and generative AI travel planning assistant integrated into the search flow.

name: Expedia
business_model: Full-service OTA covering flights, hotels, car rentals, and packages. Merchant and agency models.
ai_strategy: AI-driven itinerary builder (One Key rewards integration), virtual travel agent chatbot, and machine-learning yield optimization.

name: Trip.com
business_model: Dominant OTA in Asia-Pacific covering flights, rail, hotels and packaged tours. Strong corporate travel arm.
ai_strategy: AI Trip Planner using LLMs for natural-language itinerary generation; real-time translation and 24/7 AI customer service.

name: Airbnb
business_model: Peer-to-peer platform for unique accommodations and experiences. Service fee on both guest and host side.
ai_strategy: AI photo tour generation, smart pricing for hosts, AI-powered review summarization, and personalized home recommendations.

name: Agoda
business_model: Asia-focused OTA owned by Booking Holdings. Specializes in hotel and vacation rental bookings with aggressive flash deals.
ai_strategy: AI-based dynamic pricing alerts, personalized deal surfacing, and multilingual search using NLP.

name: MakeMyTrip
business_model: India's largest OTA covering flights, hotels, trains, and buses. Revenue via commissions and margins.
ai_strategy: AI chatbot for booking support, ML-based fare prediction, and personalized holiday packages.

name: Kiwi.com
business_model: Flight-focused OTA specializing in multi-carrier combinations and virtual interlining to find cheapest routes.
ai_strategy: Proprietary Nomad engine uses graph algorithms and ML to discover non-obvious connection routes across carriers.

name: etraveli
business_model: Flight-first OTA operating across Europe under multiple brands. Now a Booking Holdings company.
ai_strategy: ML-based ancillary upsell optimization, smart seat and baggage recommendation at checkout.

name: eDreams ODIGEO
business_model: Europe's largest online travel group. Subscription model (Prime) on top of flight/hotel OTA to drive loyalty.
ai_strategy: Prime AI engine predicts price drops for subscribers; ML personalization drives ancillary attachment rate.
